slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard SemiBold, no decoration, no quotes. Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 011. Center: large warm brown bold headline 분유 타는 물 온도·순서, two lines, 완전정복 with teal green #2C7A5C underline. Below: small gray subtitle 안전하게 타는 법 · WHO·CDC 가이드라인. Bottom center: LARGE cute character illustration — chubby baby sitting with warm milk bottle, mother figure gently holding thermometer, soft steam from bottle, warm cozy colors, gentle pastel tones. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral #E05C3A rounded label: 고위험 아기. Large bold headline: 뜨거운 물로 타야 하는 warm brown, 이유 teal green #2C7A5C underline. Center: large cute illustration — worried baby character with shield icon, small bacteria characters being defeated by hot water steam, warm protective colors. Below illustration: light cream #FFF0E0 rounded card with text: 생후 2개월 미만·조산아·면역저하 아기 → 70도 이상 뜨거운 물 필수 (크로노박터 감염 예방). Small subtitle: 분유 가루는 무균 상태가 아닙니다 — WHO 권고. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal #2C7A5C rounded label: 건강한 만삭아. Large bold headline: 체온 정도 물로 warm brown, 타도 됩니다 teal green underline. Center: cute illustration — healthy chubby baby character smiling, mother testing water temperature on wrist, warm gentle colors. Below: two cream #FFF0E0 rounded cards side by side. Left card: 끓여서 식힌 물 (체온 정도) OK + checkmark. Right card: 먹이기 전 손목 안쪽에 떨어뜨려 온도 확인 37도 정도 + thermometer icon. Small note below: 고위험군은 여전히 70도 이상 필요. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 순서가 중요. Large bold headline: 물 먼저 → warm brown, 분유 나중 teal green #2C7A5C underline. Center: large sequential illustration — Step 1: water pouring into bottle (blue gentle stream), Step 2: powder scoop adding to water, cute numbered circles 1-2, warm pastel colors. Below: light cream #FFF0E0 rounded warning card with coral #E05C3A accent border: 분유 먼저 넣으면 농도 부정확 → 영양소 부족 또는 신장·소화기관 부담. Small icon: concerned baby character. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral #E05C3A rounded label: 절대 금지. Large bold headline: 전자레인지로 warm brown, 데우지 마세요 coral underline. Center: large illustration — microwave with big red X, bottle inside with uneven heat spots (red/orange danger zones), worried baby character outside, warm but cautious colors. Below: cream #FFF0E0 rounded card with coral accent: 불균등 가열 → 뜨거운 부분이 아기 입 데일 위험. Right side: small illustration showing proper method — bottle in ice water bowl, gentle blue cooling effect, safe checkmark. Bottom thin coral divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 보관 시간. Large bold headline: 탄 분유 warm brown, 언제까지 OK? teal green #2C7A5C underline. Center: three cream #FFF0E0 rounded cards in vertical stack. Card 1: 상온 2시간 이내 + clock icon + room temperature illustration. Card 2: 수유 시작 후 1시간 이내 + baby drinking icon. Card 3: 냉장 보관 24시간 이내 + refrigerator icon with cute characters. Each card with small teal checkmark. Bottom small note: 2시간 넘으면 즉시 냉장 보관. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small coral #E05C3A rounded label: 위생 필수. Large bold headline: 남은 분유는 warm brown, 반드시 버리기 coral underline. Center: illustration — baby bottle with remaining milk + trash bin icon, red X over reusing, small bacteria characters (cute but cautionary), warm colors. Below: two cream #FFF0E0 rounded cards side by side. Left: 수유 후 남은 분유 → 침 섞여 박테리아 증식 위험. Right: 제조 전 손 씻기 + 작업대·젖병 소독 필수 + soap/cleaning icons. Small cute doctor character giving thumbs up. Bottom thin coral divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 정확한 농도. Large bold headline: 제조사 지침 warm brown, 꼭 따르세요 teal green #2C7A5C underline. Center: large illustration — formula can with measuring scoop, precise water measurement in bottle, cute mother character carefully measuring, warm reassuring colors. Below: cream #FFF0E0 rounded card: 전용 스푼 사용 + 정확한 물·분유 비율 → 영양소 균형 유지. Small warning note with coral accent: 크로노박터 감염 드물지만 영아에게 심각 (패혈증·뇌수막염) — 고위험군 특별 주의. Small shield icon with baby. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0. Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Large headline: 오늘 확인하고 저장하세요 warm brown, 저장하세요 teal #2C7A5C underline. Source box cream #FFF0E0 rounded. 출처 warm brown small bold. · CDC Infant Formula Preparation and Storage 2026. · WHO Safe Preparation of Powdered Infant Formula 2007. · AAP How to Safely Prepare Baby Formula 2024. Warm brown divider line. 소아과언니 warm brown bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray. Divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 warm brown. 소아과수첩 앱 · 수유 기록으로 분유량 체크 teal. No pixel text. No quotes. Cute character illustrations around brand block — baby with bottle, thermometer, measuring scoop icons in warm pastel style.

# 캐릭터 일러스트 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 소프트 파스텔 베이지 #FFF8F0
- 텍스트: 웜 브라운 #3D2B1F
- 강조: teal green #2C7A5C
- 경고: coral #E05C3A
- 카드 배경: 크림 #FFF0E0
- 일러스트: 따뜻한 수채화풍 아기/엄마/음식 캐릭터 (cute, chubby, warm)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 warm brown (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350. Warm character illustration style. Soft pastel background #FFF8F0.
Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown #3D2B1F Pretendard SemiBold, no decoration, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · [번호].
Center: large warm brown bold headline [토픽 핵심어], two lines, [둘째 줄] with teal green #2C7A5C underline.
Below: small gray subtitle [부제] · AAP 권장 기준.
Bottom center: LARGE cute character illustration [토픽 관련 귀여운 아기/엄마 장면], warm cozy colors, chubby characters.
No pixel text. No quotes.

## 2x2 그리드 패턴
Four cards in 2x2 grid, each light cream #FFF0E0 rounded.
Each card: cute character illustration inside + Korean label below.
Small teal checkmark corner.
Warm pastel colors throughout.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (귀여운 X)
Four forbidden food/item cards in 2x2 grid.
Each: cute illustrated item with red X overlay + Korean label + reason.
Warm background maintained (NOT dark).

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)

Top-right: 소아과언니 warm brown small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE.
Large headline: 오늘 확인하고 저장하세요 warm brown, 저장하세요 teal #2C7A5C underline.
